column1: # Tests that the evaluate callback fires correctly for nested
# and chained expressions, including left-associative chains,
# Expression as map value alongside plain values
# Factorial with other ops — ! binds tighter than * and +
# Function calls: min and max (preval parens)
# Functions combined with operators (result of function in expression)
# Nested functions (literal args only — expressions inside func args are not evaluated by expr plugin)
